hyperedges.label: Shared proto compilation across Python + Rust + service protos
GCS crawler archive pipeline (daemon + crawler + audit)
Claude Code config lifecycle (audit -> staging -> team guides)
Multi-Replica Safety Net (Leader + Webhook ID + Redis)
Rust Service gRPC Dependency Mesh (7 upstreams)
BO caller contract: extension + retry-loop + exception hierarchy
FR validation hardening: drop URL fallback + API gate + crawler gate
Go migration: chi router + ws hub + safeJoin store

hyperedges.label: Shared proto compilation across Python + Rust + service protos
GCS crawler archive pipeline (daemon + crawler + audit)
Claude Code config lifecycle (audit -> staging -> team guides)
Multi-Replica Safety Net (Leader + Webhook ID + Redis)
Rust Service gRPC Dependency Mesh (7 upstreams)
BO caller contract: extension + retry-loop + exception hierarchy
FR validation hardening: drop URL fallback + API gate + crawler gate
Go migration: chi router + ws hub + safeJoin store
